specs.title: LGN-001: Login page UI elements are visible
LGN-006: Password show/hide toggle works
LGN-003/LGN-004/LGN-005: Basic validation errors appear for invalid input
LGN-007: Invalid credentials show generic error
LGN-008: Successful login redirects to home
LGN-009: Enter key submits login form
LGN-002: Logo click navigates to app landing route
LGN-010: Keyboard tab order reaches interactive controls
LGN-011: Login API failure shows guarded behavior
LGN-012: Long email and password values are handled safely
LGN-001-S: @smoke Login page loads with all key elements
LGN-008-S: @smoke Successful login with valid credentials
LGN-013: @regression Empty email field shows validation error
LGN-014: @regression Empty password field shows validation error
LGN-015: @regression Whitespace-only credentials are rejected
HOME-001/HOME-002: Home loads and cart button navigates to cart
HOME-003: Profile dropdown shows menu options
HOME-005: Sorting dropdown contains expected options
HOME-008: Price sort low to high behaves correctly
HOME-010: Add to cart updates badge
HOME-004: Logout clears session and protects home route
HOME-006: A to Z sort orders product names ascending
HOME-007: Z to A sort orders product names descending
HOME-009: Search option is discoverable and usable when available
HOME-011: Favourite toggle control is clickable on product cards
HOME-012: Footer links are visible and at least one is navigable
HOME-013: Product API failure keeps UI in guarded state
HOME-001-S: @smoke Home page loads with product listing after login
HOME-010-S: @smoke Add to cart increments the cart badge
